'''tathovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oaker|oaker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oaker|oaker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tathovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || tætheveth || tæthevej || tæthevesh || tætheve
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || tathothovoth || tathothovoj || tathothovosh || tathothovo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tathovoth || tathovoj || tathovosh || tathovo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tathofvofth || tathofvofj || tathofvofsh || tathofvof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tathovotho || tathovojo || tathovosho || tathovoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || tathovoth || tathovoj || tathovosh || tathovo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tathovothol || tathovojol || tathovoshol || tathovokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tathovoothotho || tathovoojojo || tathovooshosho || tathovooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || tathovothon || tathovojon || tathovoshon || tathovokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tathovothooro || tathovojooro || tathovoshooro || tathovokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
